message:
test(bd-2xpx,bd-cqqa): cover remaining renderer.rs and traffic.rs branches

renderer.rs: Add 7 tests for Debug/Clone, format_duration/latency/bytes
boundary values, format_percentage full case, render_oneline with zero
requests, and build_panel_text row count.

traffic.rs: Add 8 tests for Debug/Clone, detect constructor, rich success
response, rich response without duration, rich request without params,
method_color shutdown prefix, show_timing disabled, and error preview
without data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
